2606.23881.title: Ground Then Rank: Revisiting Knowledge-Based VQA with Training-Free Entity Identification
2606.23881.paper_summary: Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering (KB-VQA) requires grounding visual queries to external knowledge beyond directly observable content in images. While recent multi modal large language models (MLLMs) show strong perceptual abilities, they struggle on KB-VQA tasks requiring groundings from both fine-grained entity and evidence levels. Most existing multi-modal retrieval augmented generation (MM-RAG) methods tightly couple entity discrimination and section-level evidence ranking into a single re-ranking stage, leading to high cost and limited generalization. In this work, we revisit existing MM-RAG solutions from a workflow perspective and argue both entity-level and fact-level groundings are key bottlenecks. We observe that although MLLMs often fail under open-ended entity naming, they can better identify the correct entity when selecting from a small set of candidate names. Based on this insight, we propose a simple and training-free identify-before-answer IBA framework that decouples entity identification from section-level re-ranking. Our approach prompts an MLLM to select high-confidence entities using only candidate names, followed by an off-the-shelf textual re-ranker for evidence selection. Experiments on Encyclopedic-VQA and InfoSeek show that our method consistently outperforms fine-tuned multi-modal re-ranking baselines while reducing training and inference complexity. Additional analyses reveal that the improvements arise not only from better entity identification, but also from selecting more informative evidence once correct entity is fixed. Our implementation is made public to ease reproducibility.
2606.23881.paper_summary_zh: 知識基礎的視覺問題回答（KB-VQA）需要將視覺查詢與超出圖像中直接可觀察內容的外部知識進行關聯。雖然最近的多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）展現出強大的感知能力，但在需要從細粒度實體和證據層面進行關聯的KB-VQA任務上，它們卻面臨挑戰。大多數現有的多模態檢索增強生成（MM-RAG）方法將實體區分和段落層級的證據排名緊密結合在單一的重新排名階段中，導致高成本和有限的泛化能力。在這項工作中，我們從工作流程的角度重新審視現有的MM-RAG解決方案，並認為實體層級和事實層級的關聯是關鍵瓶頸。我們觀察到，儘管MLLMs在開放式實體命名下經常失敗，但當從一小組候選名稱中進行選擇時，它們能更好地識別正確的實體。基於這一見解，我們提出了一個簡單且無需訓練的識別前回答（IBA）框架，將實體識別與段落層級的重新排名解耦。我們的方法促使MLLM僅使用候選名稱選擇高信心的實體，然後使用現成的文本重新排名器進行證據選擇。在Encyclopedic-VQA和InfoSeek上的實驗表明，我們的方法在減少訓練和推理複雜性的同時，始終超越微調的多模態重新排名基準。額外的分析顯示，這些改進不僅來自於更好的實體識別，還來自於在正確實體確定後選擇更具信息量的證據。我們的實現已公開，以便於重現。
2606.23881.author: Qian Ma et.al.
2606.23881.authors: Qian Ma, Qiong Wu, Zhengyi Zhou, Yao Ma
